message:
fix(terminal): detect WEZTERM_PANE as mux indicator and handle panic=abort builds in cleanup suppression

Terminal capabilities:
- Extend WezTerm mux detection to recognize WEZTERM_PANE environment
  variable in addition to WEZTERM_UNIX_SOCKET, since mux-served panes
  may only set the pane marker
- Suppress DEC synchronized output in WEZTERM_PANE sessions due to
  observed instability in mux passthrough
- Add tests verifying WEZTERM_PANE detection, in_any_mux() participation,
  and sync output policy suppression (with and without TERM_PROGRAM set)

Terminal session panic cleanup:
- Guard with_panic_cleanup_suppressed() behind cfg(panic = "abort") so
  that abort-profile builds skip the suppression depth tracking entirely,
  since catch_unwind cannot recover panics in that profile
- Adjust test to verify suppression is disabled under abort profile

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
